items.limitationEn: The study noted better physical function in the control group at 90-day follow-up, suggesting potential limitations in the long-term benefits of prehabilitation or a need for program adjustments.

items.title: Use and safety of corticosteroid injections in joints and musculoskeletal soft tissue: guidelines from the American Society of Regional Anesthesia and Pain Medicine, the American Academy of Pain Medicine, the American Society of Interventional Pain Physicians, and the International Pain and Spine Intervention Society
items.summary: New guidelines from multiple American pain societies address the use and safety of corticosteroid injections in joints and musculoskeletal soft tissues, highlighting that recommended effective doses are lower than currently used by clinicians and emphasizing short-term benefits with mixed long-term relief.
items.curatedReason: 新的皮质类固醇注射指南提供了关于关节和肌肉骨骼软组织注射用药剂量和安全性的重要更新。请对照你的临床实践，确保用药剂量符合最新建议，以最大化短期疗效并降低不良事件风险。
items.titleZh: 类固醇注射在关节和肌肉骨骼软组织中的应用与安全性：多学会联合指南
items.summaryZh: 美国多个疼痛学会发布新指南，针对皮质类固醇注射在关节和肌肉骨骼软组织中的应用与安全性，强调推荐有效剂量低于临床常用剂量，并指出短期疗效显著但长期缓解效果不一。
items.curatedReasonEn: New corticosteroid injection guidelines provide crucial updates on dosage and safety for joint and musculoskeletal soft tissue injections. Review your clinical practice to ensure adherence to the latest recommendations, maximizing short-term efficacy and minimizing adverse event risks.

items.title: Immediate Weight-Bearing and Early Ambulation Rehabilitation After Femoral Neck System Fixation for Undisplaced Femoral Neck Fractures: A Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A prospective randomized controlled trial investigated immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation rehabilitation after femoral neck system fixation for undisplaced femoral neck fractures.
items.curatedReason: 股骨颈骨折内固定术后立即负重和早期活动是一种安全有效的康复策略。对于未移位股骨颈骨折患者，你可以更积极地推行早期康复，以促进功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 股骨颈系统内固定术后未移位股骨颈骨折的即刻负重和早期活动康复：一项前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性随机对照试验研究了未移位股骨颈骨折患者在股骨颈系统内固定术后立即负重和早期活动康复的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation after femoral neck system fixation for undisplaced femoral neck fractures is a safe and effective rehabilitation strategy. For patients with undisplaced femoral neck fractures, you can more actively promote early rehabilitation to facilitate functional recovery.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于未移位股骨颈骨折患者，结果不适用于其他类型的股骨颈骨折。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to patients with undisplaced femoral neck fractures, and the results are not applicable to other types of femoral neck fractures.

items.title: Prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury: a systematic review and meta-analysis for the female, woman and girl Athlete Injury pRevention (FAIR) consensus
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis on prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury in female athletes, contributing to the Female, Woman and Girl Athlete Injury pRevention (FAIR) consensus.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对女性运动员上肢损伤预防策略和可改变风险因素的系统综述和荟萃分析，是 FAIR 共识的重要组成部分。将其纳入你的预防实践，特别是针对女性运动员的特定需求。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员上肢损伤预防策略和可改变风险因素的系统综述和荟萃分析：FAIR 共识
items.summaryZh: 一项针对女性运动员上肢损伤预防策略和可改变风险因素的系统综述和荟萃分析，旨在为女性运动员损伤预防（FAIR）共识提供依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis on upper extremity injury prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors in female athletes is a crucial component of the FAIR consensus. Integrate it into your prevention practice, especially for the specific needs of female athletes.
items.limitation: 此 PDF 链接仅为早期预览，未提供完整的样本量和效应量细节。
items.limitationEn: This PDF link is only an early preview and does not provide full sample size and effect size details.

items.title: The Impact of a Single Bout of Antagonist Stretching on Agonist Muscle Performance and Range of Motion: A Systematic review and Meta-analysis
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the impact of a single bout of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion, aiming to synthesize conflicting findings.
items.curatedReason: 单次拮抗肌牵伸对拮抗肌表现和关节活动度 (ROM) 的影响，这项系统综述和荟萃分析提供了确凿证据。这意味着你可以在运动前暖身中策略性地应用拮抗肌牵伸来优化表现或改善 ROM。
items.titleZh: 单次拮抗肌牵伸对拮抗肌表现和关节活动度的影响：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析探讨了单次拮抗肌牵伸对拮抗肌表现和关节活动度 (ROM) 的影响，旨在综合现有相互矛盾的研究结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis provides solid evidence on the impact of a single bout of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion (ROM). This means you can strategically apply antagonist stretching in pre-exercise warm-ups to optimize performance or improve ROM.
items.limitation: 该综述未提供具体的效应量，限制了临床实践中牵伸强度和持续时间的精确指导。
items.limitationEn: The review did not provide specific effect sizes, limiting precise guidance on stretching intensity and duration in clinical practice.

items.title: Effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigated the effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder.
items.curatedReason: 针对冻结肩的疼痛神经科学教育 (PNE) 是一个有潜力的非药物干预。虽然效应量和长期益处仍需更多 RCT 确证，但你可以考虑将其作为辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 疼痛神经科学教育对冻结肩患者疼痛、运动恐惧、功能障碍和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验探讨了疼痛神经科学教育对冻结肩患者的疼痛、运动恐惧、功能障碍和生活质量的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pain Neuroscience Education (PNE) for frozen shoulder shows promise as a non-pharmacological intervention. While effect sizes and long-term benefits need further RCT confirmation, you might consider it as an adjunctive therapy.
items.limitation: 研究未提供具体的样本量和关键效应量，限制了结果的精确解读。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide specific sample size and key effect sizes, limiting precise interpretation of results.

items.title: Effects of OsteoStrong vs. dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women in the BONEMORE randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial evaluated the effects of OsteoStrong versus dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women.
items.curatedReason: 比较 OsteoStrong 与动态多成分运动对老年女性身体机能的影响。对于寻求改善骨骼健康的替代方案，可以参考本研究，但请注意其特异性。
items.titleZh: OsteoStrong 与动态多成分运动对老年女性身体机能影响的比较：BONEMORE 随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验评估了 OsteoStrong 与动态多成分运动对老年女性身体机能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study compares OsteoStrong with dynamic multicomponent exercise for physical function in older women. For those seeking alternative bone health interventions, this research provides a reference, but note its specificity.
items.limitation: 研究特定于老年女性人群，结果外推到其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study is specific to older women, and extrapolation of results to other populations should be cautious.

items.title: Biokinetic insights into the hip–spine relationship: no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain
items.summary: A biokinetic study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain, suggesting a more complex hip-spine relationship than previously understood.
items.curatedReason: 针对伴有腰痛的患者，本研究未能发现髋关节力量或柔韧性与骨盆运动改变之间的关联。这提示你评估腰痛患者时，不应过度聚焦于孤立的髋关节生物力学缺陷，而是应考虑更广泛的评估框架。
items.titleZh: 髋脊关系中的生物动力学洞察：腰痛患者髋关节力量或柔韧性与骨盆运动改变无相关性
items.summaryZh: 一项生物动力学研究发现，腰痛患者的髋关节力量或柔韧性与骨盆运动改变之间没有相关性，提示髋脊关系比先前理解的更为复杂。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain. This suggests that when assessing LBP patients, you shouldn't overly focus on isolated hip biomechanical deficits but consider a broader assessment framework.
items.limitation: 研究对象为特定人群，其结果可能不适用于所有腰痛患者。
items.limitationEn: The study population is specific, and its results may not be generalizable to all patients with low back pain.

items.title: Mattress impact on lifestyle and back pain: a 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline
items.summary: A 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline evaluated whether mattress characteristics impact sleep quality and low back pain, concluding that inadequate bedding support may lead to morning stiffness and discomfort.
items.curatedReason: 床垫对生活方式和背痛的影响综述强调了睡眠表面对肌肉骨骼健康的重要性。在评估患者背痛时，请务必询问其睡眠环境，并针对性地给出床垫选择建议。
items.titleZh: 床垫对生活方式和背痛的影响：一项 25 年骨科文献综述指南
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 25 年的骨科文献综述指南评估了床垫特性是否影响睡眠质量和腰背痛，结论是床垫支撑不足可能导致晨僵和不适。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review on mattress impact on lifestyle and back pain highlights the importance of sleeping surfaces for musculoskeletal health. When assessing patients with back pain, always inquire about their sleeping environment and offer targeted mattress recommendations.
items.limitation: 该综述未提供具体样本量和研究设计细节，限制了证据等级的评估。
items.limitationEn: The review did not provide specific sample sizes or detailed study designs, limiting the assessment of evidence quality.

items.title: Efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia: a randomized, single-blind, controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized, single-blind, controlled trial investigated the efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难患者显示出有效性和安全性。你可以将这项技术纳入康复方案，作为传统吞咽训练的有力补充。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式、sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的疗效和安全性：一项随机、单盲、对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机、单盲、对照试验研究了沉浸式、sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难患者的疗效和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Immersive sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training shows efficacy and safety for post-stroke dysphagia patients. You can integrate this technology into rehabilitation programs as a powerful complement to traditional swallowing training.
items.limitation: 研究为单盲试验，可能存在部分偏倚；且未明确说明样本量。
items.limitationEn: The study is a single-blind trial, which may have some bias, and the sample size is not explicitly stated.
